# Grow & Close

> Senior-led GTM execution studio for B2B SaaS. Positioning, landing pages, outbound, founder content, campaigns, dashboards, and enablement — shipped weekly on a monthly subscription (Pipeline One $3,500/mo, Pipeline Team $7,000/mo). Founded by Varun Choraria. Contact: hello@growandclose.com.

## Company

- [About](https://growandclose.com/about): how the studio runs — senior judgment, AI-assisted execution, human-approved releases

## Services

- [All GTM services](https://growandclose.com/services): the nine services and how they combine around one priority
- [Positioning & Messaging](https://growandclose.com/services/positioning-and-messaging)
- [Landing Pages](https://growandclose.com/services/landing-pages)
- [Outbound Activation](https://growandclose.com/services/outbound-activation)
- [AEO & Data Stories](https://growandclose.com/services/aeo-and-data-stories)
- [Sales Enablement](https://growandclose.com/services/sales-enablement)
- [Campaign Strategy](https://growandclose.com/services/campaign-strategy)
- [GTM Dashboards](https://growandclose.com/services/gtm-dashboards)
- [Customer Advocacy](https://growandclose.com/services/customer-advocacy)
- [Founder-led Content](https://growandclose.com/services/founder-led-content)

## Free Claude Skills

Installable expert workflows for B2B SaaS GTM, free with email:

- [Skills library](https://growandclose.com/skills)
- [ICP Sharpener](https://growandclose.com/skills/icp-sharpener-b2b): turn a vague target market into a decision-ready ICP with triggers and disqualifiers
- [Landing Page Teardown](https://growandclose.com/skills/landing-page-teardown): conversion audit with scores and pasteable rewrites
- [Outbound Sequence Writer](https://growandclose.com/skills/outbound-sequence-writer): 5-touch trigger-based cold sequences under 90 words per email
- [GTM Dashboard Spec](https://growandclose.com/skills/gtm-dashboard-spec): questions-first metrics spec with engineer-grade definitions
- [AEO Page Audit](https://growandclose.com/skills/aeo-page-audit): four-layer audit of AI-search visibility and citability
